arn.description: Amazon Resource Name used for IAM policies and API calls

domain_validation_options.description: Details for validating the domain ownership for the certificate

id.description: Unique identifier for tracking the certificate resource

not_after.description: Expiration date indicating when the certificate becomes invalid

not_before.description: Start date indicating when the certificate becomes valid

pending_renewal.description: Flag indicating if the certificate renewal is in progress

renewal_eligibility.description: Indicates whether the certificate is eligible for automatic renewal

renewal_summary.description: Summary of the renewal status and associated actions

status.description: Current operational state of the certificate

tags_all.description: All tags applied to the certificate for organizational purposes

validation_emails.description: Email addresses used for domain validation process
